video_prompt: The video features a woman speaking about a human-scale mock-up of a space habitat that was brought on a road show across the country. She is wearing a black dress and standing in front of a blue curtain. The woman is gesturing with her hands while speaking.

speech_prompt.speaker: Speaker1
speech_prompt.text: And last year, we built a human-scale mock-up of our space habitat, and we brought it on a road show across the country.
